faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find quick answers to common queries regarding government documentation and citizen services in Thane.
faq.helpNotice: Still have questions? Chat with our team now.

items.q: How much time does it take for Aadhaar correction?
items.a: Generally, Aadhaar updates take 7-15 working days. However, you will receive an update on your registered mobile number as soon as it's processed.

items.q: Which documents are required for an Income Certificate?
items.a: Usually, you need your Aadhar card, Ration card, 3 years' of salary slips or IT returns, and a self-declaration. We assist with the complete checklist based on your profile.

items.q: Can I book train/bus tickets here?
items.a: Yes, we provide fast and confirmed booking services for IRCTC Rail, Private Bus, and Flight tickets with instant receipt.
Yes, we are a registered MSME business and follow all government guidelines to ensure secure processing of your sensitive documents.
